on the actuator/prometheus endpoint.

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which
fails on the :ro mounted init-graph.cypher. The file is already
mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

commit.message:
fix: anticipo should not trigger invoice request notification

When a pago is an anticipo and doesn't cover the full cotización total,
send a "anticipo registrado" message instead of "preparé solicitud de
factura". Invoice request only triggers when monto_pagado >= total.

Three notification types now:
- Anticipo (es_anticipo + not fully paid): no invoice suggestion
- Partial payment (not fully paid): no invoice suggestion
- Full payment (monto_pagado >= total): suggest invoice to RE

commit.message:
Add employee login system + provider schedule manager

Part 1 — Employee Auth System:
- Supabase Auth login with email/password
- employees table with flexible permission toggles (is_admin + granular)
- audit_log table for tracking all employee actions
- Login page at /login with branded UI
- AuthProvider context wrapping all pages
- AdminLayout shows employee name, title, sign out button
- Admin pages redirect to /login if not authenticated
- Nav items filtered by permissions

Part 2 — Provider Schedule Manager:
- New admin page at /admin/provider-schedule
- View all providers' weekly availability at a glance
- Edit hours modal (toggle days, set start/end times)
- Add date-specific overrides (custom hours or full day off)
- Remove overrides inline
- Cal.com API integration for schedule CRUD
- Permission-gated: admins edit all, providers edit own

Part 3 — Employee Management:
- New admin page at /admin/employees (requires can_manage_employees)
- Add/edit/deactivate employees
- Toggle admin access with single switch
- Granular permission checkboxes per employee
- Auto-creates Supabase Auth accounts

Initial team seeded: Chris (admin), Damien (provider), Lily (RN),
Evan, Damon, Tara (staff)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Mark F1-opposite :partial — unblock F2-literature

F1-opposite has sufficient evidence to proceed: H-F1 refuted for n=3,4
(SAT witnesses), n=5 inconclusive (solver timeout, recorded dead-end).
No counterexample in feasible range. Further falsification has
diminishing returns. Moving to :partial unblocks the F2-literature →
C1-structure → C2-strategy construction path while codex bridge is down.

commit.message:
Harden invite form token retrieval with /api/auth/token fallback

If the browser Supabase client has no session (SSR-only login where
setSession was never called on the browser client), fall back to
GET /api/auth/token which reads the server-side SSR cookies directly.
This covers all login paths: password, magic link, and OAuth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Overhaul layout: use position:fixed for guaranteed full coverage

Complete rewrite of the viewport approach. Instead of trying to
make height:100% or flex-1 fill the screen (which fails on Safari
due to viewport quirks), use position:fixed with inset:0 on the
root container. This pins the app to every edge of the viewport
with zero gaps - exactly how Twitter, Instagram, and other major
mobile web apps handle this.

Changes:
- Root wrapper: position:fixed inset:0 (covers entire viewport)
- SplashScreen: position:fixed inset:0
- Auth: removed duplicate gradient (parent has it now)
- index.html: simplified to just margin:0 padding:0 overflow:hidden
- No html/body background manipulation needed
- Background switches between gradient and cream based on route
- Scrolling handled by flex-1 overflow-y-auto inside the fixed container

commit.message:
Silently omit FOR UPDATE on SQLite for engine-transparent usage

SQLite uses file/WAL-level locking so row-level FOR UPDATE is not
applicable. The library now omits it automatically so users don't
need to worry about the engine when using FOR UPDATE/SKIP LOCKED/NOWAIT.

Add PWA support for iPhone home screen install

feat: v1.0.16 — infrastructure/ layer extraction (Clean Architecture)

- Create src/tmux_orchestrator/infrastructure/ package with:
  - infrastructure/tmux.py: canonical home for TmuxInterface (libtmux adapter)
  - infrastructure/claude_trust.py: canonical home for pre_trust_worktree (filesystem adapter)
  - infrastructure/__init__.py: re-exports TmuxInterface, PaneOutputEvent, POLL_INTERVAL, pre_trust_worktree

- Strangler Fig shims at old paths:
  - tmux_interface.py: re-exports from infrastructure.tmux; preserves libtmux/time for @patch compat
  - trust.py: re-exports from infrastructure.claude_trust

- Add tests/test_infrastructure_purity.py (15 tests):
  - AST-based checks: domain/ and application/ do not import infrastructure/
  - Package structure checks: infrastructure/ exists with correct files
  - Shim identity checks: shim classes/functions are same objects as canonical

- Design doc: design/v1.0.16-infrastructure-layer.md with references to
  Cockburn (Hexagonal Architecture 2024), Martin (Clean Architecture 2017),
  Sourcery AI (dependency rules enforcement)

- Bump version to 1.0.16; total tests: 1242 (all pass)

commit.message:
fix: invalidate keyword cache on rediscover so KD is re-fetched

Old keyword metrics (with KD=0) were cached for 30 days from before
the bulk_keyword_difficulty endpoint was integrated. Rediscover now
invalidates both the suggestion cache and keyword metric cache before
re-fetching, ensuring fresh KD values from DataForSEO.
